name: I was running when I slipped at work, will they say it's my fault?

mainEntity.name: I was running when I slipped at work, will they say it's my fault?

acceptedAnswer.text: No-fault comp still covers; running doesn't disqualify unless gross misconduct.
acceptedAnswer.description: In no-fault workers' comp (Utah/Idaho), your contributory negligence like running doesn't bar benefits unless intoxication or intentional self-harm. Benefits may reduce slightly for misconduct[2][3]. Key factors: Focus on employer safety violations; comparative fault rare in comp. Document if hazard obvious but unavoidable. Get attorney to counter 'horseplay' defenses.

description: No-fault comp still covers; running doesn't disqualify unless gross misconduct.
